name: cc
description: Claude Code Plugin for Codex. Delegate reviews, investigations, tracked tasks, and inspect Claude tool logs from inside Codex.

interface.longDescription: Use Claude Code from inside Codex to run read-only reviews, adversarial design reviews, and tracked rescue tasks through a Claude-backed runtime with job status, results, and captured tool logs.
defaultPrompt: Use Claude Code to review my current changes through $cc:review
Use Claude Code to investigate and fix this issue through $cc:rescue
Show the Claude Code tool log through $cc:log
